name: reativa
description: Fine-grained reactive web interfaces for OCaml and Melange, powered by signals.

scripts.demo: opam exec -- dune build @melange && npx --yes esbuild _build/default/demo/ui/output/demo/ui/todo.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=demo/ui/bundle.js
scripts.demo:watch: opam exec -- dune build @melange -w & npx --yes esbuild _build/default/demo/ui/output/demo/ui/todo.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=demo/ui/bundle.js --watch
scripts.demo:jsoo: REATIVA_JSOO=enabled opam exec -- dune build examples/jsoo/todo.bc.js && cp _build/default/examples/jsoo/todo.bc.js examples/jsoo/bundle.js
scripts.docs:dev: opam exec -- dune build @melange && vite --config website/vite.config.mjs
scripts.docs:build: opam exec -- dune build @melange && vite build --config website/vite.config.mjs

author: Bernardo Gurgel <brnrdog@hey.com>
